rationale: Bug hunt C26 revealed both BUG-035/036 fixes were ghosts (status claimed fixed, code unchanged). Re-fixed as BUG-037/038. Dashboard now correctly reads meta.faction_rep and state.oghams.skills_unlocked. BiomeRadial hover panel was also C26 ghost — implemented with CRT-styled tooltip showing name, subtitle, guardian, season, difficulty, maturity bar.
next_cycle_plan: Bug hunt C27: verify hover panel font rendering with special chars (season glyphs ❀☀◈❅☽), edge case when all 8 biomes are locked. Feature candidates: word minigame skeleton for card encounters (core loop gap — bible s.6), or MerlinBubble typewriter effect enhancement.
